qa_pairs.question: What happened to the Niagara and Mist compute clusters on January 22, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: On January 22, 2025, the Niagara and Mist compute nodes were shut down from 8 AM to 5 PM EST. This outage was to support ongoing system improvements and the integration with the new Trillium system.

qa_pairs.question: During the January 22, 2025 outage of the Niagara and Mist compute nodes, which services remained operational?
qa_pairs.answer: During the January 22, 2025 outage of the Niagara and Mist compute nodes, the login nodes, file systems, and the HPSS system remained available. The scheduler also held submitted jobs until the maintenance was finished.
